### Post by Pauly Psychotic on 2007-10-28
bump please someone help!

i am able to view the cd rom by manually sudo mount -t iso9660 /dev/cdrom /media/cdrom

and then I have to type eject in the terminal to exit but I don't want to do this everytime I put in a DVD/CD......
